use std::fs::File;
use std::io::Read;

fn load_file(path: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let mut file = File::open(path)?;
    let mut contents = String::new();
    file.read_to_string(&mut contents)?;
    Ok(contents)
}

fn read_config(path: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let contents = std::fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    Ok(contents)
}

fn read_json(path: &str) -> Result<serde_json::Value, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let mut file = File::open(path)?;
    let mut contents = String::new();
    file.read_to_string(&mut contents)?;
    let value = serde_json::from_str(&contents)?;
    Ok(value)
}

fn load_large_data(path: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let mut file = File::open(path)?;
    let mut buffer = Vec::new();
    file.read_to_end(&mut buffer)?;
    Ok(buffer)
}
